summary: Live MIDI keyboard input — ALSA (libasound sequencer) + WinMM (midiInOpen/midiInProc) backends wired through an atomic SPSC ring + table-driven CC dispatch. Explicit device routing via --midi <N> decodes (client<<8)|port on Linux / raw devid on WinMM; --midi wildcard auto-subscribes to every readable MIDI_GENERIC|MIDI_KEYBOARD port. --no-midi opt-out preserves the 16-s byte-identical golden (FR-050/FR-053).

user_stories.title: MIDI note triggering mapped to scale-degree + active voice pool
CC dispatch via CC_MAP[128] routes 6 controllers to filter/reverb/delay/compressor

linux.transport: snd_seq_open(SND_SEQ_OPEN_INPUT) + snd_seq_connect_from + polling worker pthread (poll, 100ms window)

win32.transport: midiInOpen(CALLBACK_FUNCTION) + 4 sysex MIDIHDR buffers + MIM_DATA short-message parser

surface.cc_table: CC_MAP[128] (8 mapped, 120 silently dropped per Principle VII)
surface.ring: midi_queue_t (256 entries x 4 B = 1024 B, BSS-allocated, atomic head/tail)

cli.effect: wildcard idx=-1; auto-subscribe to readable ALSA ports / WAVE_MAPPER on winmm
explicit; decode (N>>8, N&0xFF) on linux, raw devid on winmm
channel filter at drain time, BEFORE CC dispatch
enumerate; print '<index> <name>' per device, capped at 32

tests.unit: tests/unit/test_midi.c (23 tests across US1/US2/US3 + T036 wildcard sentinel)
tests.smoke: tests/test_smoke_live.sh (audio + new --midi wildcard sub-check via snd-seq-dummy)

docs.arch: ARCHITECTURE.md (T041 MIDI input surface subsection under Live audio backends)
docs.operator: README.md (## MIDI subsection: flag table, mapping contract, CC table, disconnect)

key_invariants: FR-034: graceful disconnect via atomic g_run from the producer side; no auto-reconnect
Principle III v1.0.1: cross-platform invariant preserved (Linux glibc + Windows winmm, both little-endian x86)
Principle VII: unassigned CCs silently dropped (no per-CC overhead)
followups: T044-T049 (verification gates: CI, byte-identity, smoke, coverage, size, platform-scope) — continuous, kept [ ] in tasks.md by convention
Replace ~93% ARCH hedge with a real make coverage measurement now that PR #108 + #109 lift audio_midi.* further
